command: deadline=$((SECONDS+60)); while [ $SECONDS -lt $deadline ]; do docker compose -f '/home/mintru/Documents/authz/authz-system/deploy/docker-compose.yml' logs --since=60s payments | grep -q 'KAFKA CONSUME OK' && exit 0; sleep 2; done; docker compose -f '/home/mintru/Documents/authz/authz-system/deploy/docker-compose.yml' logs --tail=200 payments; exit 1

deadline=$((SECONDS+20)); while [ $SECONDS -lt $deadline ]; do docker compose -f '/home/mintru/Documents/authz/authz-system/deploy/docker-compose.yml' logs --since=20s payments | grep -q 'NATS CONSUME OK' && exit 0; sleep 2; done; docker compose -f '/home/mintru/Documents/authz/authz-system/deploy/docker-compose.yml' logs --tail=200 payments; exit 1
